subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: The Revelation of Bahá‘u'lláh contains all the great laws and principles of social government. The basis of God's perfect laws is love for humanity and help for human needs.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
